pages.text: Thandi whizzed on a rollercoaster, took a bumper car for a spin, and won a giant, fluffy bear…

blocks.text: Thandi whizzed on a rollercoaster, took a bumper car for a spin, and won a giant, fluffy bear…

pages.text: …all while she sat in her bedroom.

blocks.text: …all while she sat in her bedroom.

pages.text: Ndalo swam through forests of kelp and coral, past a stingray and a majestic shark…

blocks.text: Ndalo swam through forests of kelp and coral, past a stingray and a majestic shark…

pages.text: …as he lay under a yellowwood tree.

blocks.text: …as he lay under a yellowwood tree.

pages.text: Yohluka rocketed into space on a special mission to repair a satellite…

blocks.text: Yohluka rocketed into space on a special mission to repair a satellite…

pages.text: …but he was still cuddling on the couch.

blocks.text: …but he was still cuddling on the couch.

pages.text: Faith paraded through the veld, waving to zebras as an oxpecker soared above…

blocks.text: Faith paraded through the veld, waving to zebras as an oxpecker soared above…

pages.text: …from the safety of Gogo’s warm kitchen.

blocks.text: …from the safety of Gogo’s warm kitchen.

pages.text: On Monday morning, Ms Kani asked the class, “So, what did you do this weekend?”

blocks.text: On Monday morning, Ms Kani asked the class,
“So, what did you do this weekend?”

pages.text: “I drove a car!” “I swam with a shark!” “I flew to outer space!” “I rode an elephant!”
Ms Kani laughed. “It sounds like you’ve been reading again. Now, which book do you want to read next?”

blocks.text: “It sounds like you’ve been reading again. Now, which book do you want to read next?”
